provisions.content: This Notice may be cited as the National Security (Classified Matters) (Authorised Officer) Notice.

The Chief Secretary to the President, President's Office, is hereby appointed as authorised officer for the purposes of declaring any information or thing to be classified matter. History of this document 31 July 2002 this version Consolidation Related documents More documents like this one [] [] [] [] ▲ To the top > Contact us Visit our Twitter/X profile Visit our Linked In profile Visit our YouTube channel About TanzLII TanzLII is operated by the Judiciary of Tanzania and the Office of the Attorney General, Chief Parliamentary Draftsman, and publishes the law of Tanzania for free online access for all. Free Access to the law supports the rule of law and access to justice. TanzLII partners with African Legal Information Institute and Laws.Africa , who provide it with technical support.
